title: Define IndexerDefinition, IndexerBackend, and IndexQuery core types
markdown:
## Goal

Create the `b3nd-indexer` library with the core type definitions that the entire indexer system builds on: `IndexerDefinition` (how a developer defines an indexer), `IndexerBackend` (the storage interface for indexed data), and `IndexQuery` (how developers query indexed data).

## Background

B3nd stores everything as `[uri, data]` pairs. This is great for key-value access but terrible for queries like "find all recipes with tag=vegetarian sorted by date." An indexer watches incoming messages, extracts fields, and stores them in a queryable format (SQL tables, etc).

The indexer system has three layers:
1. **Definition** -- developer declares which URI patterns to index and which fields to extract
2. **Backend** -- the actual query engine (Postgres, SQLite, etc.) that stores and queries the indexed data
3. **Query** -- the interface for filtering, searching, sorting, and aggregating indexed data

This story creates the type definitions only. Implementation follows in subsequent stories.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New workspace member `libs/b3nd-indexer/` with `deno.json`, `mod.ts`, `types.ts`
- [ ] `IndexerDefinition` interface:
  - `name: string` -- unique indexer name
  - `version: number` -- schema version (for evolution)
  - `uriPatterns: string[]` -- URI prefixes this indexer watches (e.g., `["mutable://recipes"]`)
  - `extract: (uri: string, data: unknown) => Record<string, unknown> | null` -- field extraction function (null = skip)
  - `fields: IndexFieldDefinition[]` -- field schemas for the indexed data
- [ ] `IndexFieldDefinition` interface:
  - `name: string`
  - `type: "string" | "number" | "boolean" | "date" | "json"`
  - `indexed?: boolean` (default true)
  - `searchable?: boolean` (for full-text search, default false)
  - `nullable?: boolean` (default true)
- [ ] `IndexerBackend` interface:
  - `initialize(definition: IndexerDefinition): Promise<void>`
  - `index(uri: string, fields: Record<string, unknown>, version?: number): Promise<void>`
  - `remove(uri: string): Promise<void>`
  - `query(query: IndexQuery): Promise<IndexQueryResult>`
  - `search(text: string, options?: SearchOptions): Promise<IndexQueryResult>`
  - `aggregate(pipeline: AggregationStage[]): Promise<AggregationResult>`
  - `health(): Promise<{ healthy: boolean; documentCount: number; lastIndexedAt?: number }>`
  - `teardown(): Promise<void>` -- drop all indexed data
  - `cleanup(): Promise<void>` -- release connections
- [ ] `IndexQuery` interface:
  - `filter?: Record<string, FilterOperator>`
  - `search?: string`
  - `select?: string[]`
  - `sort?: Array<{ field: string; order: "asc" | "desc" }>`
  - `limit?: number`
  - `offset?: number`
- [ ] `FilterOperator` type covering: `$eq`, `$ne`, `$gt`, `$gte`, `$lt`, `$lte`, `$in`, `$nin`, `$contains`, `$startsWith`
- [ ] `IndexQueryResult` interface:
  - `items: Array<{ uri: string; fields: Record<string, unknown>; version?: number }>`
  - `total: number`
  - `hasMore: boolean`
- [ ] `SearchOptions` interface: `{ fields?: string[]; limit?: number; offset?: number }`
- [ ] `AggregationStage` type: `$match | $group | $sort | $limit | $project`
- [ ] `AggregationResult` interface: `{ rows: Record<string, unknown>[]; total: number }`
- [ ] All types exported from `libs/b3nd-indexer/mod.ts`
- [ ] Workspace member added to root `deno.json`

## Implementation Guide

1. Create `libs/b3nd-indexer/` directory
2. Create `libs/b3nd-indexer/deno.json`:
   ```json
   {
     "name": "@bandeira-tech/b3nd-indexer",
     "version": "0.1.0"
   }
   ```
3. Create `libs/b3nd-indexer/types.ts` with all type definitions listed above
4. Create `libs/b3nd-indexer/mod.ts` that re-exports everything from `types.ts`
5. Add `"libs/b3nd-indexer"` to the `workspace` array in root `deno.json`
6. Run `deno check libs/b3nd-indexer/mod.ts` to verify types compile

## Files to Create/Modify

- `libs/b3nd-indexer/deno.json` -- new: workspace config
- `libs/b3nd-indexer/types.ts` -- new: all indexer type definitions
- `libs/b3nd-indexer/mod.ts` -- new: re-exports
- `deno.json` -- add workspace member

## Testing

```bash
deno check libs/b3nd-indexer/mod.ts
```

Types-only library -- no runtime tests needed yet.

## Dependencies

- **Depends on**: Nothing
- **Blocks**: G1-A6-02 (Postgres backend), G1-A6-03 (createIndexerProcessor), G1-A6-06 (query), G1-A6-07 (aggregation)

pr.title: feat(indexer): define core types for indexer system

tasksExcerpt:
- [ ] Implement `IndexerDefinition` interface and runtime
- [ ] Implement `IndexerBackend` — at least one backend (SQLite or Postgres)
- [ ] Implement `createIndexerProcessor` — compose `Processor` that pipes messages to indexer
- [ ] Implement message feed / event stream (pull-based cursor, `GET /api/v1/feed?since={cursor}`)
- [ ] Implement backfill mechanism (paginate through source node, replay through indexer)
- [ ] Implement cursor store (using B3nd node itself as storage)
- [ ] Implement `
